note: Mathlib/Topology/Instances/RealVectorSpace.lean:37 (theorem map_real_smul:26) — a continuous additive map between real topological vector spaces is R-linear; generalizes the standard continuous-solution resolution of f(x+y)=f(x)+f(y) (only linear maps) beyond R->R to arbitrary TVS.
verify_note: Decl confirmed at exact cited lines (toRealLinearMap:37, map_real_smul:26); source matches note verbatim — a continuous AddMonoidHom between real TVS is reinterpreted as ℝ-linear, the standard continuous-solutions-are-linear resolution of Cauchy's equation generalized past ℝ→ℝ; 'generalization' (not 'exact') is the honest label since it's not literally f(x+y)=f(x)+f(y) on ℝ.

note: Mathlib/Algebra/Star/SelfAdjoint.lean:55 — class IsStarNormal (x : R), x commutes with star x, defined for any star monoid; instantiating R = Matrix n n K with star = conjugate transpose gives exactly the normal-matrix condition A*Aᴴ = Aᴴ*A.
verify_note: Decl confirmed at cited line (class IsStarNormal:55, 'Commute (star x) x'); verified Matrix.instStar (LinearAlgebra/Matrix/ConjTranspose.lean:411) sets star=conjTranspose so IsStarNormal on Matrix n n K unfolds exactly to Mᴴ*M=M*Mᴴ — the note's claim is definitionally exact; 'generalization' is honest since the decl itself is a bare star-monoid abstraction, not matrix-specific.

note: Mathlib/Order/SaddlePoint.lean:46 — formalizes the game-theoretic/minimax saddle point of a two-variable function f (f a y <= f x b for all x,y), a distinct-but-related sense of 'saddle point' from the calculus critical-point/Hessian-indefinite notion that mathworld:SaddlePoint and eom:Saddle_point primarily describe; no calculus-sense saddle-point def found in Mathlib.
verify_note: Decl confirmed at cited line (def IsSaddlePointOn:46, minimax inequality def); Wikidata Q690935 label/description ('stationary point that is not a local extremum') confirms it's the calculus sense, distinct from Mathlib's minimax sense — repo-wide grep found no calculus/Hessian saddle-point decl, so 'related' (not 'exact') is the honest, non-overclaiming label.
